news.t: This Top-Performing Small-Cap Manager Is Betting Big on China

holdings.infoBox: MEMX is an equity ETF with a total of 79 individual holdings. The top holdings are Samsung Electronics stock at 10.95%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 9.46%, Jp Morgan Us Govt Capital 3164 at 9.12%, SK hynix at 4.52%, and MediaTek at 2.71%.

overview.description: The Matthews Emerging Markets ex China Active ETF (MEMX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in companies from emerging markets, excluding China, considered to have sustainable growth potential. MEMX was launched on Jan 11, 2023 and is issued by Matthews.

data.title: This Top-Performing Small-Cap Manager Is Betting Big on China
data.text: The Matthews Emerging Markets Small Companies fund has delivered a 15.1% annualized three-year return, landing it in the top 1% of its peers. Here's what manager Vivek Tanneeru is buying now.
